name: Verify Manager can remove User from organization
description:
Invite member1 with Manager role. Invite member2 with User role.
Verify that:
    - Manager can remove User from organization
descriptionHtml:
Invite member1 with Manager role. Invite member2 with User role.
Verify that:
- Manager can remove User from organization

testStage.description:
Invite member1 with Manager role. Invite member2 with User role.
Verify that:
    - Manager can remove User from organization
